summary: Non-blocking approval. Four concerns raised: producer_type no-clobber gap, incomplete registry coverage (4/8 artifact types), non-deterministic phase_review artifact_id, silent status override. None blocking because schema const constraints catch highest-risk fields and scope was explicitly limited.
rationale: The implementation correctly addresses all 8 acceptance criteria within the defined scope. The injection-before-validation pattern is sound. The evidence trust boundary is preserved by registry exclusion. The concerns identified are real but represent incremental improvement opportunities rather than correctness failures. The producer_type gap is the most substantive risk but requires schema-level changes outside this task scope to fully resolve.
